```{r}
    filename = "vars_dens.png",
    plot = p,
    path = here::here("Figs/Supplement/"),
    width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm", dpi = "retina"
  )


# Z-Score transformed density plots 
dat_dens_z <- clustered_dat |> 
  group_by(name) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(name, Date, active_network_length_m, PPT_1d, Q_1d, Depth_1d, ET_1d, avgPar, headGradient_1d) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(name, Date),  # keep Site and Date, melt everything else
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )
means_dens_z <- dat_dens_z |>
  group_by(name, variable) |>
  summarise(mean_val = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(dat_dens_z |> 
         filter(
      (variable == "Q_1d"   & value < 4) |
      (variable == "PPT_1d" & value < 2.5) |
      !(variable %in% c("Q_1d", "PPT_1d"))
    ), aes(x = value, fill = name)) +
  geom_density(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(
    data = means_dens_z,
    aes(xintercept = mean_val, color = name),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = setNames(site_meta$color, site_meta$name),
    breaks = levels(site_meta$name)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = setNames(site_meta$color, site_meta$name),
    breaks = levels(site_meta$name)
  ) +
  labs(title = "RF Variables Z-Score Transformed") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) -> p
ggsave(
    filename = "vars_dens_zscore.png",
    plot = p,
    path = here::here("Figs/Supplement/"),
    width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm", dpi = "retina"
  )

# 0-100 transformed density plots 
dat_dens_scaled <- clustered_dat |>
  select(name, Date, active_network_length_m, PPT_1d, Q_1d, Depth_1d, ET_1d, avgPar, headGradient_1d) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(name, Date),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  group_by(name, variable) |>
  mutate(
    scaled_value = (value - min(value, na.rm = TRUE)) / 
                   (max(value, na.rm = TRUE) - min(value, na.rm = TRUE)) * 100
  ) |>
  ungroup()

means_dens_scaled <- dat_dens_scaled |>
  group_by(name, variable) |>
  summarise(mean_val = mean(scaled_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(dat_dens_scaled, aes(x = scaled_value, fill = name)) +
  geom_density(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(
    data = means_dens_scaled,
    aes(xintercept = mean_val, color = name),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = setNames(site_meta$color, site_meta$name),
    breaks = levels(site_meta$name)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = setNames(site_meta$color, site_meta$name),
    breaks = levels(site_meta$name)
  ) +
  labs(title = "RF Variables 0-100 Scale") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) ->p
ggsave(
    filename = "vars_dens_0-100.png",
    plot = p,
    path = here("Figs/Supplement/"),
    width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm", dpi = "retina"
  )

# Site centered density plots 
dat_dens_cent <- clustered_dat |> 
  select(name, Date, active_network_length_m, PPT_1d, Q_1d, Depth_1d, ET_1d, avgPar, headGradient_1d) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(name, Date),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  group_by(name, variable) |> 
    mutate(
    value = value - mean(value, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()
means_dens_cent <- dat_dens_z |>
  group_by(name, variable) |>
  summarise(mean_val = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(dat_dens_cent |> 
         filter(
      (variable == "Q_1d"   & value < 4) |
      (variable == "PPT_1d" & value < 2.5) |
      !(variable %in% c("Q_1d", "PPT_1d"))
    ), aes(x = value, fill = name)) +
  geom_density(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(
    data = means_dens_cent,
    aes(xintercept = mean_val, color = name),
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.6,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = setNames(site_meta$color, site_meta$name),
    breaks = levels(site_meta$name)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = setNames(site_meta$color, site_meta$name),
    breaks = levels(site_meta$name)
  ) +
  labs(title = "RF Variables Centered") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) -> p
ggsave(
    filename = "vars_dens_mean_centered.png",
    plot = p,
    path = here::here("Figs/Supplement/"),
    width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm", dpi = "retina"
  )
```

```{r}


metrics <- c(
  "PPT_7d",
  "Q_1d", "Q_7d", "Q_60d",
  "Depth_1d", "Depth_60d",
  "headGradient_1d", "headGradient_30d",
  "ET_7d",
  "avgPar",
  "active_network_length_m",
  "water.temp"
)

metric_names <- c(
  PPT_7d = "Precip (7 Day Avg.)",
  Q_1d = "Discharge", Q_7d = "Discharge (7 Day Avg.)", Q_60d = "Discharge (60 Day Avg.)",
  Depth_1d = "Depth", Depth_60d = "Depth (60 Day Avg.)",
  headGradient_1d = "Head Gradient", headGradient_30d = "Head Gradient (30 Day Avg.)",
   ET_7d = "ET (7 Day Avg.)",
  avgPar = "Light",
  active_network_length_m = "ASDN",
  water.temp = "Water Temp"
)

# Pivot data long
plot_data <- rf_dat |>
  filter(!is.na(Cluster)) |> 
  select(name, Cluster, any_of(metrics)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = any_of(metrics), names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") |>
  mutate(Metric_label = metric_names[Metric],
         name = factor(name, levels = c("GP-1", "GP-2", "GP-3", "EF-1", "EF-2", "EF-3", "ND-1", "ND-2")))



p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = name, y = Value, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
  geom_jitter(
    alpha = 0.1,
    aes(color = Cluster),
    position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.2, dodge.width = 0.75)
    ) +
  facet_wrap(~Metric_label, scales = "free_y") +  # facet by metric
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  labs(title = "Random Forest Data by Cluster",
    x = "", y = "Value") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

ggsave(
    filename = "rf_data.png",
    plot = p,
    path = here::here("Figs/Supplement/"),
    width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm", dpi = "retina"
  )

```

# Find Best Lag

```{r}
source(here("Code/functions/rf_model.R"))

plan(multisession, workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1)

evaluate_lag <- function(dat, var, lag_k) {
  # Case weights
  cluster_counts <- table(dat$Cluster)
  #cluster_weights <- sqrt(max(cluster_counts) / cluster_counts)
  cluster_weights <- c("1" = .2, "2" = .3, "3" = .5)
  roll_var <- paste0(var, "_roll", lag_k)

  dat_roll <- dat |>
    group_by(Site, name) |>
    arrange(Date) |>
    mutate(
      "{roll_var}" := slider::slide_dbl(.data[[var]],
                                .f = mean,
                                .before = lag_k,
                                .after = 0,
                                .complete = FALSE)
    ) |>
    ungroup() |>
    filter(!is.na(.data[[roll_var]]),
           !is.na(Cluster)) |>
    mutate(
      case_wt = case_when(
        Cluster == "1" ~ cluster_weights["1"],
        Cluster == "2" ~ cluster_weights["2"],
        Cluster == "3" ~ cluster_weights["3"]
      ),
      case_wt = importance_weights(case_wt)
    ) |> 
    select(Cluster, all_of(roll_var), case_wt) 


  folds <- vfold_cv(dat_roll, v = 5, strata = "Cluster")

  # Recipe
  rec <- recipe(Cluster ~ ., data = dat_roll) |>
    step_zv()
    
  # RF Spec
  model_spec <- rand_forest(trees = 500) |>
    set_engine("ranger", seed = 42, num.threads = 1) |>
    set_mode("classification")
  # Workflow
  wf <- workflow() |>
    add_model(model_spec) |>
    add_recipe(rec) |> 
    add_case_weights(case_wt)

  # Results
  res <- wf |>
    fit_resamples(folds, metrics = metric_set(kap, f_meas, accuracy, roc_auc),
                  control = control_resamples(save_pred = TRUE))

  res |>
    collect_metrics() |>
    mutate(variable = var, lag = lag_k)
}


vars <- c("water.temp", "Q", "Depth", "headGradient",
          "PPT", "avgPar", "ET", "active_network_length_m")

max_lag <- 60

grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  variable = vars,
  lag = 0:max_lag
)

lagged_data <- dailyDat |>
  as_tibble() |>
  # group_by(Site) |>
  # mutate(active_network_length_m = active_network_length_m/max(active_network_length_m, na.rm = T)*100,
  #        active_upstream_length = active_upstream_length/max(active_upstream_length, na.rm = T)*100) |>
  # ungroup() |>
  select(-ends_with(c("_7d", "_14d", "_30d", "_60d"))) |>
  rename_with(~ gsub("_1d$", "", .x), ends_with("_1d")) |>
  select(-c("active_upstream_length", "a_cent", "a_cent_weighted", "Season", "DOY", "excProb",
            "DOSat.exc", "air.temp", "minDO.pctsat", "maxDO.pctsat", "avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp", "probHypSat",
            "wetQf", "maxPar", "waterYear", "percent_network_wet")) |>
  left_join(pca_scores |> select(name, Date, Cluster), by = c("name", "Date")) |>
  relocate(c("name", "Cluster"), .after = Site) |>
  arrange(Site, Date)


# scale data
lagged_data_scaled <- lagged_data |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  # # mutate(across(
  # #   all_of(c("active_network_length_m", "avgPar", "Depth", "Q", "ET", "PPT")),
  # #   ~ ( (.x - min(.x, na.rm = TRUE)) /
  # #       (max(.x, na.rm = TRUE) - min(.x, na.rm = TRUE)) ) * 100
  # # )) |>
  mutate(active_network_length_m = active_network_length_m/max(active_network_length_m, na.rm = T)*100)# |>
  # mutate(
  #   across(all_of(c("avgPar", "Depth", "Q", "ET", "PPT")),
  #          ~ .x - mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))
  # ) |>
  #  # mutate(across(all_of(c("active_network_length_m", "avgPar", "Depth", "Q", "ET", "PPT")), ~ scale(.)[, 1])) |>
  # ungroup() |>
  # group_by(Site) |>
  # mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ as.numeric(scale(.x)))) |>
  # ungroup()

lag_results <- future_map_dfr(
  seq_len(nrow(grid)),
  function(i) {
    evaluate_lag(
      dat = lagged_data_scaled,
      var = grid$variable[i],
      lag_k = grid$lag[i]
    )
  },
  .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
)
plan(sequential)
```

```{r}
best_points <- lag_results |>
  group_by(variable, .metric) |>
  #mutate(mean = round(mean, 2)) |>
  mutate(
         best_mean = max(mean, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  filter(mean >= best_mean *.97) |>
  slice_min(lag, n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-best_mean) |>
  mutate(variable = case_when(variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],TRUE ~ variable),
         .metric = case_when(.metric == "accuracy" ~ "Accuracy",
                             .metric == "f_meas" ~ "F1",
                             .metric == "kap" ~ "Kappa",
                             .metric ==  "roc_auc" ~ "ROC AUC"))


lag_results |>
  mutate(variable = case_when(variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],TRUE ~ variable),
         .metric = case_when(.metric == "accuracy" ~ "Accuracy",
                             .metric == "f_meas" ~ "F1",
                             .metric == "kap" ~ "Kappa",
                             .metric ==  "roc_auc" ~ "ROC AUC")) |>
  #filter(.metric %in% c("F1")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = mean, color = variable)) +
  geom_line() +
  see::scale_color_okabeito() +
  # geom_point(
  #   data = best_points,#|> filter(.metric %in% c("F1")),
  #   aes(x = lag, y = mean),
  #   color = "red",
  #   alpha = 0.5,
  #   show.legend = FALSE
  # ) +
  #   geom_text_repel(
  #   data = best_points,#|> filter(.metric %in% c("F1")),
  #   aes(x = lag, y = mean, label = lag),
  #   vjust = -0.6,
  #   color = "red",
  #   size = 4,
  #   show.legend = FALSE
  # ) +
  facet_grid(.metric ~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Performance Across Metrics",
    subtitle = "Higher is better",
    x = "Days Prior",
    y = "Performance",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(    text = element_text(size = 18),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
    legend.position = "none") -> p
p


ggsave(
  filename = "best_lags.png",
  plot = p,
  path = here("Figs/Supplement/"),
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
)
```

# Random Forest

```{r}
# Find best lag
best_lag <- lag_results |>
  filter(.metric == c("f_meas")) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(
         best_mean = max(mean, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  filter(mean >= best_mean * 0.97) |>
  slice_min(lag, n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-best_mean)

# - Day 0: ASDN, depth, discharge
# - Day 14: PPT, water temp
# - Day 30: ET, head gradient (?), light
# - Day 60: head gradient (?)
day0_lag <- best_lag |> 
  mutate(lag = 0)
best_lag <- best_lag |> 
  mutate(lag = c(0, 30, 14, 0, 0, 30, 30, 14))
  #mutate(lag = 0)

# best_lag <- rbind(best_lag, day0_lag) |>
#  distinct(variable, lag)

best_lags_data <- lagged_data_scaled

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_lag))) {
  var  <- best_lag$variable[i]
  lagn <- best_lag$lag[i]
  col_name <- paste0(var, "_", lagn, "d")
  
  best_lags_data <- best_lags_data |>
    group_by(Site, name) |>
    arrange(Date) |>
    mutate(
      !!col_name := slider::slide_dbl(
        .data[[var]],
        mean,
        .before = lagn,
        .after = 0,
        .complete = FALSE
      )
    ) |>
    ungroup()
}

# Drop the original (un-lagged) variable columns
best_lags_data <- best_lags_data |>
  select(-any_of(best_lag$variable)) |>
  drop_na(Cluster) |> 
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(
      where(is.numeric) & !active_network_length_m_0d,
      ~ scale(.) |> as.numeric()
    )) |> 
   ungroup()

png(here("Figs/best_lag_corr.png"), width = 2160, height = 2160)
best_lags_data |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  (\(cor_mat) {
    pretty_names <- var_names[colnames(cor_mat)] |>
      stringr::str_wrap(width = 10)
    dimnames(cor_mat) <- list(pretty_names, pretty_names)
    corrplot(
      cor_mat,
      method = "number",
      type = "lower",
      order = "hclust",
      tl.pos = "d",
      tl.col = "black",
      diag = TRUE,
      tl.cex = 3,
      number.cex = 4,
      cl.cex = 3,
      col = colorRampPalette(c("#e8000d", "#dde5ed", "#0051ba"))(200),
      cl.lim = c(-1, 1),
    )
  })()

dev.off()

rf_lagged_mod <- fit_full_model(df = best_lags_data, response = "Cluster", label = "best_lag_rounded_scaled")
final_wf <- rf_lagged_mod$final_wf
final_fit <- rf_lagged_mod$final_fit
fitted_model <- extract_fit_parsnip(final_fit)$fit
train_data <- rf_lagged_mod$train_data
test_data <- rf_lagged_mod$test_data

selected_vars <- rf_lagged_mod$selected_vars
tune_res <- rf_lagged_mod$tune_results
best_params <- rf_lagged_mod$best_params
autoplot(tune_res)
conf_matrix <- rf_lagged_mod$confusion_matrix
print(conf_matrix)
save(fitted_model, selected_vars, test_data, file = here("Results/rf/model_objects_lag_rounded_scaled.RData"))
beep(2)
```

```{r}
cor_mtest <- function(mat, conf.level = 0.95) {
  mat <- as.matrix(mat)
  n <- ncol(mat)
  p.mat <- matrix(NA_real_, n, n)
  lowCI <- matrix(NA_real_, n, n)
  uppCI <- matrix(NA_real_, n, n)

  diag(p.mat) <- 0
  diag(lowCI) <- 1
  diag(uppCI) <- 1

  for (i in seq_len(n - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):n) {
      tmp <- cor.test(mat[, i], mat[, j], use = "complete.obs", conf.level = conf.level)

      p.mat[i, j] <- tmp$p.value
      p.mat[j, i] <- tmp$p.value

      lowCI[i, j] <- tmp$conf.int[1]
      lowCI[j, i] <- tmp$conf.int[1]

      uppCI[i, j] <- tmp$conf.int[2]
      uppCI[j, i] <- tmp$conf.int[2]
    }
  }

  colnames(p.mat) <- rownames(p.mat) <- colnames(mat)
  colnames(lowCI) <- rownames(lowCI) <- colnames(mat)
  colnames(uppCI) <- rownames(uppCI) <- colnames(mat)

  list(p = p.mat, lowCI = lowCI, uppCI = uppCI)
}

num_data <- best_lags_data |>
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric))

cor_mat <- cor(num_data, use = "complete.obs")
test_res <- cor_mtest(num_data)

pretty_names <- var_names[colnames(cor_mat)] |>
  stringr::str_wrap(width = 10)

dimnames(cor_mat) <- list(pretty_names, pretty_names)
dimnames(test_res$p) <- list(pretty_names, pretty_names)

png(here("Figs/best_lag_corr.png"), width = 2160, height = 2160, res = 300)

corrplot(
  cor_mat,
  method = "number",
  type = "lower",
  order = "hclust",
  number.cex = 0.9,
  tl.pos = "d",
  tl.col = "black",
  tl.cex = 0.75,
  diag = T,
  p.mat = test_res$p,
  sig.level = 0.05,
  insig = "blank",
  col = colorRampPalette(c("#e8000d", "#dde5ed", "#0051ba"))(200),
  cl.lim = c(-1, 1)
)

dev.off()
```

### SHAP w/ weighted model

### 05_calc_bootstrapped_shap.R

```{r}
# Read all saved kernelshap objects
files <- list.files(path = here("Results/SHAP_Rounded_Lags_Scaled"), pattern = "kernelshap_iter_\\d+\\.rds", full.names = TRUE)
shap_list <- lapply(files, readRDS)

# Overall Mean |SHAP| with 95% CI
overall_mean_abs_shap <- shap_list |>
  seq_along() |>
  lapply(\(b) {
    ks <- shap_list[[b]]
    ks$S |>
      lapply(abs) |>
      (\(lst) Reduce("+", lst) / length(lst))() |>
      colMeans() |>
      (\(x) tibble(predictor = names(x), mean_abs_shap = as.numeric(x), Boot = b))()
  }) |>
  do.call(what = rbind) |>
  group_by(predictor) |>
  summarise(
    lo = quantile(mean_abs_shap, 0.025),
    hi = quantile(mean_abs_shap, 0.975),
    mean_abs_shap = mean(mean_abs_shap),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    predictor = case_when(
      predictor %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[predictor],
      TRUE ~ predictor
    )
  )

shap_imp <- overall_mean_abs_shap |>
  ggplot(aes(x = mean_abs_shap, y = reorder(predictor, mean_abs_shap))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2C3E50", width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lo, xmax = hi), height = 0.25) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
       title = "SHAP Variable Importance",
       x = "Mean |SHAP|",
       y = "Predictor")
shap_imp

# Cluster-level SHAP with 95% CI
clust_shap <- seq_along(shap_list) |>
  lapply(\(b) {
    ks <- shap_list[[b]]
    names(ks$S) |>
      lapply(\(clust_name) {
        shap_mat <- ks$S[[clust_name]]
        as_tibble(shap_mat) |>
          cbind(ks$X |> select(Site, Date)) |>
          transform(Cluster = clust_name, Boot = b)
      }) |>
      do.call(what = rbind)
  }) |>
  do.call(what = rbind) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("Boot"), abs)) |>
  # summarise per bootstrap × cluster first

  group_by(Boot, Cluster) |>
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("Boot"), mean), .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_longer(-c(Cluster, Boot), names_to = "predictor", values_to = "shap") |>
  # normalise within each bootstrap × cluster

  group_by(Boot, Cluster) |>
  mutate(norm_shap = shap / sum(shap)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  # now summarise across bootstraps
  group_by(Cluster, predictor) |>
  summarise(
    lo = quantile(norm_shap, 0.025),
    hi = quantile(norm_shap, 0.975),
    norm_shap = mean(norm_shap),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    ClusterLabel = paste("State", Cluster),
    predictor = case_when(
      predictor %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[predictor],
      TRUE ~ predictor
    )
  )

cluster_var_prop <- clust_shap |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(predictor, -norm_shap), y = norm_shap, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), alpha = 0.8, width = 0.75) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.25
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = label_wrap(15)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Relative SHAP Importance by Regime",
       x = "Predictor",
       y = "Proportion of Total |SHAP|",
       fill = "State")
cluster_var_prop


ggsave(
  filename = "rounded_lags_cluster_var_prop.png",
  plot = cluster_var_prop,
  path = here("Figs/RF_Models/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
  )

# Region-level SHAP with 95% CI
region_shap <- seq_along(shap_list) |>
  lapply(\(b) {
    ks <- shap_list[[b]]
    names(ks$S) |>
      lapply(\(clust_name) {
        shap_mat <- ks$S[[clust_name]]
        as_tibble(shap_mat) |>
          cbind(ks$X |> select(Site, Date)) |>
          transform(Cluster = clust_name, Boot = b)
      }) |>
      do.call(what = rbind)
  }) |>
  do.call(what = rbind) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  left_join(site_info |> select(Site, Region)) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("Boot"), abs)) |>
  # summarise per bootstrap × region × cluster
  group_by(Boot, Region, Cluster) |>
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("Boot"), mean), .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_longer(-c(Cluster, Region, Boot), names_to = "predictor", values_to = "shap") |>
  # normalise within each bootstrap × region × cluster
  group_by(Boot, Cluster, Region) |>
  mutate(norm_shap = shap / sum(shap)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  # summarise across bootstraps
  group_by(Cluster, Region, predictor) |>
  summarise(
    lo = quantile(norm_shap, 0.025),
    hi = quantile(norm_shap, 0.975),
    norm_shap = mean(norm_shap),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    ClusterLabel = paste("State", Cluster),
    predictor = case_when(
      predictor %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[predictor],
      TRUE ~ predictor
    )
  ) |> 
  group_by(Region, predictor) |>
  mutate(pred_mean_region = mean(norm_shap, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    predictor = reorder(predictor, pred_mean_region),
    Cluster = factor(Cluster, levels = c("1", "2", "3"))
  )


zero_trim <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x == 0, "0", label_number(accuracy = 0.01)(x))
}

region_cluster_var_imp <- ggplot(region_shap,
                               aes(x = predictor, y = norm_shap, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8, reverse = TRUE),
           width = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8, reverse = TRUE), width = 0.25
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Region, scales = "fixed") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = zero_trim,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion of Total |SHAP|", fill = "State") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(2.0, "lines"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20)
  )

region_cluster_var_imp

ggsave(
  filename = "rounded_lags_region_shap.png",
  plot = region_cluster_var_imp,
  path = here("Figs/RF_Models/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
)
```

```{r}
# Read all saved kernelshap objects
# files <- list.files(path = "~/Desktop/SHAP_Rounded_Lags_Scaled/", pattern = "kernelshap_iter_\\d+\\.rds", full.names = TRUE)
# shap_list <- lapply(files, readRDS)

# Build long-format individual observation SHAP values with feature values
shap_beeswarm <- seq_along(shap_list) |>
  lapply(\(b) {
    ks <- shap_list[[b]]
    # identify predictor columns from the SHAP matrix
    pred_cols <- colnames(ks$S[[1]])
    names(ks$S) |>
      lapply(\(clust_name) {
        shap_mat  <- ks$S[[clust_name]]
        feat_mat  <- ks$X |> select(all_of(pred_cols))   # predictors only
        as_tibble(shap_mat) |>
          rename_with(\(nm) paste0("shap__", nm)) |>
          bind_cols(
            feat_mat |>
              rename_with(\(nm) paste0("feat__", nm))
          ) |>
          bind_cols(ks$X |> select(Site, Date)) |>        # keep identifiers separate
          mutate(Cluster = clust_name, Boot = b)
      }) |>
      do.call(what = rbind)
  }) |>
  do.call(what = rbind) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  # average over bootstraps per observation (Site × Date × Cluster)
  group_by(across(c(starts_with("feat__"), Site, Date, Cluster))) |>
  summarise(across(starts_with("shap__"), mean), .groups = "drop") |>
  # pivot shap values long
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("shap__"),
    names_to     = "predictor",
    names_prefix = "shap__",
    values_to    = "shap"
  ) |>
  # bring in matching feature value for colour scale
  pivot_longer(
    cols         = starts_with("feat__"),
    names_to     = "feat_name",
    names_prefix = "feat__",
    values_to    = "feat_value"
  ) |>
  filter(predictor == feat_name) |>
  drop_na(feat_value) |> 
  select(-feat_name) |>
  # rescale feature value 0–1 within each predictor
  group_by(predictor) |>
  mutate(feat_scaled = (feat_value - min(feat_value, na.rm = TRUE)) /
           (max(feat_value, na.rm = TRUE) - min(feat_value, na.rm = TRUE))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    predictor    = case_when(
      predictor %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[predictor],
      TRUE ~ predictor
    ),
    ClusterLabel = paste("State", Cluster),
    Cluster      = factor(Cluster, levels = c("1", "2", "3"))
  ) |>
  group_by(predictor) |>
  mutate(pred_order = mean(abs(shap), na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(predictor = reorder(predictor, pred_order))


shap_bee <- ggplot(shap_beeswarm,
                   aes(x = shap, y = predictor, colour = feat_scaled)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  ggbeeswarm::geom_quasirandom(
    groupOnX  = FALSE,
    alpha     = 0.6,
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ ClusterLabel) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    option = "plasma",
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Low", "High")
  ) +
  #scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.001)) +
  labs(
    title   = "",
    x       = "SHAP Value",
    y       = NULL,
    colour  = "Feature\nValue"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5, 20, 5, 5, "mm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  )

shap_bee

ggsave(
  filename = "shap_beeswarm.png",
  plot     = shap_bee,
  path     = here("Figs/"),
  device   = "png",
  width    = 45,
  height   = 25,
  units    = "cm",
  dpi      = "retina"
)

shap_beeswarm_region <- shap_beeswarm |>
  left_join(site_info |> select(Site, Region), by = "Site")

shap_bee_region <- ggplot(shap_beeswarm_region,
                          aes(x = shap, y = predictor, colour = feat_scaled)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
  ggbeeswarm::geom_quasirandom(
    groupOnX = FALSE,
    alpha    = 0.4,
    size     = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(Region ~ Cluster,
             labeller = labeller(Cluster = label_both)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(
    option = "plasma",
    breaks = c(0, 1),
    labels = c("Low", "High")
  ) +
 # scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.001)) +
  labs(
    title  = "SHAP Summary Plot by Region and State",
    x      = "SHAP Value",
    y      = NULL,
    colour = "Feature\nValue"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    strip.text.y      = element_text(angle = 0),          # readable region labels
    panel.spacing     = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

shap_bee_region

ggsave(
  filename = "shap_beeswarm_region.png",
  plot     = shap_bee_region,
  path     = here("Figs/"),
  device   = "png",
  width    = 45,
  height   = 40,                                          # taller to fit region rows
  units    = "cm",
  dpi      = "retina"
)
```

### Conf Mat

```{r}
# List of cluster labels
labels <- c("all_clusters", "cluster_1", "cluster_2", "cluster_3")
cluster_colors <- c("1" = "#0072B2","2" = "#009E73","3" = "#E69F00")

# Read all importance files into one long dataframe
importance_df <-read_csv(here("Results/rf/best_lag_rounded_scaled_model_importance.csv")) |>
  #mutate(Cluster = label) |>
  mutate(
    predictor = case_when(predictor %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[predictor],
                         TRUE ~ predictor  # Keep original if not found in var_names
                         )
    ) |> 
  mutate(norm_importance = importance / max(importance, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()
  

impVars <- importance_df |>
  mutate(predictor = str_wrap(predictor, width = 15)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(predictor, importance), y = importance)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), fill = "#2C3E50") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Predictor", y = "Scaled Variable Importance", title = "Random Forest Variable Importance") +
  theme_few() + 
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 18),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none"
    )
impVars


conf_mat <- read_csv(here("Results/rf/best_lag_rounded_scaled_model_confusion_matrix.csv")) |> 
 group_by(Prediction) |>
  mutate(precision = n / sum(n),
         freq.Perc = round(n / sum(n), 3)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(Reference) |>
  mutate(recall = n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(label = paste0("(", round(precision, 2), " / ", round(recall, 2), ")")) |> 
    mutate(label = if_else(Prediction == Reference, label, NA_character_))

conf_mat_plt <- ggplot(conf_mat) +
  geom_tile(aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction, fill = freq.Perc)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
  geom_text(
  aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction, label = n, color = Prediction == Reference), size = 8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "black", "FALSE" = "white"), guide = "none") +
  geom_text(aes(x = Reference, y = Prediction + 0.2, label = label), color = "black", size = 6) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "reverse",
    expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = 1:3,
    labels = paste("State", 1:3)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    position = "top",
    expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = 1:3,
    labels = paste("State", 1:3)
  ) +
  labs(
    fill = "Fraction Predicted",
    x = "Actual",
    y = "Predicted"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black", linewidth = 1),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    legend.title = element_text(vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = .5)
  )
conf_mat_plt
shap_imp

shap_conf <- plot_grid(conf_mat_plt, shap_imp, label_size = 0) + theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20))
shap_conf
ggsave(
  filename = "rounded_lags_shap_confmat.png",
  plot = shap_conf,
  path = here("Figs/RF_Models/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 600
)
```

## ALE

```{r}
library(ale)
rf_pred_fun <- function(object, newdata, type = "response") {
  predict(object, data = newdata)$predictions
}
plan(sequential)
plan(multisession, workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1)
# Create ALE plots with the custom prediction function
if (file.exists(here("Results/rf/ale_env.rds"))) {
  ale_rf <- read_rds(here("Results/rf/ale_env.rds"))
} else {
  ale_rf <- ale::ALE(
    model = fitted_model,
    data = train_data |> select(selected_vars, Cluster) |> drop_na(),
    y_col = "Cluster",
   # y_type = "categorical",
    pred_fun = rf_pred_fun,
    x_cols = list(d1 = TRUE), # All 1D effects
    boot_it = 1000,
    parallel = "all but one",
   seed = 42
  )
  write_rds(ale_rf, here("Results/rf/ale_env.rds"))
}
plan(sequential)

ale_plts <- suppressWarnings(plot(ale_rf))
ale_plts
for (i in selected_vars) {
  get(ale_plts, i) |> print(ncol = 2)
}


# Extract the data
ale_plot_data <- get_ale_data(ale_rf) |> 
  mutate(
    variable = case_when(variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],
                         TRUE ~ variable  # Keep original if not found in var_names
                         )
    ) |> 
  # Normalize to 0-1 scale for each cluster-variable combination
  group_by(Cluster, variable) |>
  mutate(
    # Scale to 0-1 range
    ale_scaled = (ale_values - min(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE)) / 
                       (max(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE) - min(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE)),
    ale_lower_scaled = (ale_lower - min(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                       (max(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE) - min(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE)),
    ale_upper_scaled = (ale_upper - min(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                       (max(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE) - min(ale_values, na.rm = TRUE))
  ) |>
  # mutate(
  #   ale_lower_scaled = pmax(ale_lower_scaled, -0.01),
  #   ale_upper_scaled = pmin(ale_upper_scaled, 1.01)
  # ) |>
  ungroup()

# Reorder variables by SHAP importance
var_order <- overall_mean_abs_shap |>
  arrange(desc(mean_abs_shap)) |>
  pull(predictor)

ale_plot_data <- ale_plot_data |>
  mutate(variable = factor(variable, levels = var_order))

# ale_plot_data |> 
#   ggplot(aes(x = x_values, y = ale_values, color = Cluster)) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
#   # Add confidence intervals as ribbons (behind the lines)
#   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ale_lower, ymax = ale_upper, fill = Cluster), alpha = 0.4) +
#   # Add the main ALE lines
#   geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
#   geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
#   facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
#   labs(
#     title = "ALE Effects Across All Clusters and Variables",
#     x = "Feature Values",
#     y = "ALE Values",
#     subtitle = paste("Based on", nrow(train_data), "observations with", 
#                     length(unique(train_data$Cluster)), "clusters")
#   ) +
#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
#     legend.position = "bottom",
#     panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
#   )

# Plot scaled ALE effects
ale_scaled <- ale_plot_data |>
  filter(!is.na(x_values), !is.na(ale_scaled)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = x_values, y = ale_scaled, color = Cluster, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = ale_lower_scaled, ymax = ale_upper_scaled),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA, na.rm = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.3, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_x", nrow = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Feature Values",
    y = "Normalized ALE Values (0–1)",
    fill = "Regime",
    color = "Regime"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1))
ale_scaled
ggsave(
  filename = "scaled_ale_plt.png",
  plot = ale_scaled,
  path = here("Figs/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
)
beepr::beep(2)
```

```{r}
# Extract ALE data for all clusters and variables
vars <- c("Depth_0d", "ET_30d", "PPT_14d", "Q_0d",
          "active_network_length_m_0d", "avgPar_30d",
          "headGradient_30d", "water.temp_14d")

ale_data <- map_dfr(1:3, function(cat) {
  map_dfr(vars, function(var) {
    df <- ale_rf@effect[[cat]]$ale$d1[[var]]
    x_col <- names(df)[1]
    df |>
      rename(x_ceil = all_of(x_col)) |>
      select(x_ceil, .y, .y_lo, .y_hi, .n) |>
      mutate(variable = var, cluster = factor(cat))
  })
}) |>
  mutate(
    variable = case_when(
      variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],
      TRUE ~ variable
    )
  )

vars_ordered <- var_order[var_order %in% unique(ale_data$variable)]

# Apply factor ordering
ale_data <- ale_data |>
  mutate(variable = factor(variable, levels = vars_ordered))
# Get y reference lines from y_summary
y_refs <- as.data.frame(ale_rf@params$y_summary) |>
  rownames_to_column("quantile") |>
  filter(quantile %in% c("25%", "50%", "75%")) |>
  pivot_longer(-quantile, names_to = "cluster", values_to = "value") |>
  filter(cluster != "Cluster") |>
  mutate(cluster = factor(cluster),
         label = case_when(
           quantile == "25%" ~ "25%",
           quantile == "50%" ~ "median",
           quantile == "75%" ~ "75%"
         ))

# Extract raw data for rugs
raw_data <- ale_rf@params$data$data_sample
raw_data_cols <- names(raw_data)[names(raw_data) != "Cluster"]
vars_rename <- var_names[names(var_names) %in% raw_data_cols]
reverse_var_names <- setNames(names(vars_rename), vars_rename)

# Build rug data for all variables at once
rug_data <- map_dfr(vars_ordered, function(var) {
  orig_var <- unname(reverse_var_names[var])
  if (is.na(orig_var)) orig_var <- var
  raw_data |>
    select(x = all_of(orig_var)) |>
    mutate(variable = factor(var, levels = vars_ordered))
})

# Plot with facet_wrap
test_ale <- ale_data |>
  filter(!is.na(x_ceil), !is.na(.y)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = x_ceil, color = cluster, fill = cluster)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .y_lo, ymax = .y_hi), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(aes(y = .y), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_rug(data = rug_data, aes(x = x, y = NULL),
           inherit.aes = FALSE,
           sides = "b", alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey30") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors, name = "State") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors, name = "State") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free_x", ncol = 4) +
  labs(x = "Feature Values", y = "ALE Effect") +
 # coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(
    #axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5, 6, 5, 5, "mm")  # extra right margin
  )
test_ale
ggsave(
  filename = "ale_plt.png",
  plot = test_ale,
  here("Figs/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
)
```

```{r}
site_shap <-  names(all_shap$S) |>
  lapply(\(clust_name) {
    shap_mat <- all_shap$S[[clust_name]]
    as_tibble(shap_mat) |>
      cbind(all_shap$X |> select(Site, Date)) |> 
      transform(Cluster = clust_name)
  }) |>
  do.call(what = rbind) |> 
  as_tibble() |>
  left_join(site_info |> select(Site, Region)) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), abs)) |> 
  group_by(Region, Cluster) |> 
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean)) |> 
  pivot_longer(-c(Cluster, Region), names_to = "predictor", values_to = "shap") |> 
  group_by(Cluster, Region) |> 
  #mutate(norm_shap = shap / max(shap)) |> 
  mutate(norm_shap = shap / sum(shap)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
    mutate(
    ClusterLabel = paste("Cluster", Cluster),
     predictor = case_when(predictor %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[predictor],
                         TRUE ~ predictor  # Keep original if not found in var_names
                         )
    ) 

site_cluster_var_imp <- site_shap |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(predictor, -shap), y = norm_shap, fill = Region)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(Region~Cluster, scales = "free_x") +
  #coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#613921", "#83A102", "#006475"),
    breaks = c("Great Plains", "Eastern Temperate Forests", "North American Deserts")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    x = "Predictor",
    y = "Proportion of Total |SHAP|"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

site_cluster_var_imp


# Check if the sum of the normalized shap is 1
norm_check <- site_shap |> group_by(Cluster, Region) |>
    summarise(
        sum_shap = sum(shap, na.rm = TRUE),
        sum_norm_shap = sum(norm_shap, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

site_cluster_var_imp <- site_shap |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(predictor, -shap), y = norm_shap, fill = Region)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Cluster, scales = "free_x") +
  #coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("#613921", "#83A102", "#006475"),
    breaks = c("Great Plains", "Eastern Temperate Forests", "North American Deserts")
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    x = "Predictor",
    y = "Proportion of Total |SHAP|"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

site_cluster_var_imp


site_cluster_var_imp <- site_shap |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(predictor, -shap), y = norm_shap, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Region, scales = "free_x") +
  #coord_flip() +
  # scale_fill_manual(
  #   values = c("#613921", "#83A102", "#006475"),
  #   breaks = c("Great Plains", "Eastern Temperate Forests", "North American Deserts")
  # ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    x = "Predictor",
    y = "Proportion of Total |SHAP|",
    fill = "Regime"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
  )
site_cluster_var_imp

site_shap |> group_by(Region) |>
    summarise(
        sum_shap = sum(shap, na.rm = TRUE),
        sum_norm_shap = sum(norm_shap, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

ggsave(
  filename = "site_shap.png",
  plot = site_cluster_var_imp,
  path = here("Figs/Supplement/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
)

# order predictors by overall mean importance (across all region-regime combos)
pred_order <- site_shap |>
  group_by(predictor) |>
  summarise(m = mean(norm_shap, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(m)) |>
  pull(predictor)

site_shap |>
  mutate(
    predictor = factor(predictor, levels = rev(pred_order)),
    Cluster = factor(Cluster, levels = c("1","2","3"))
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Cluster, y = predictor, fill = norm_shap)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Region, nrow = 1) +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
  labs(x = "Regime", y = NULL, fill = "Proportion of\nTotal |SHAP|") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

site_shap_ranked <- site_shap |>
  group_by(Region, predictor) |>
  mutate(pred_mean_region = mean(norm_shap, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    predictor = reorder(predictor, pred_mean_region),
    Cluster = factor(Cluster, levels = c("1","2","3"))
  )


zero_trim <- function(x) {
  ifelse(x == 0, "0", label_number(accuracy = 0.01)(x))
}

site_cluster_var_imp <- ggplot(site_shap_ranked,
                               aes(x = predictor, y = norm_shap, fill = Cluster)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8, reverse = TRUE), width = 0.75, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ Region, scales = "fixed") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = zero_trim,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Proportion of Total |SHAP|", fill = "Regime") +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(2.0, "lines"),
    # plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5.5, 20, 5.5, 5.5),
    # axis.text.y = element_text(margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 6)),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20)
  )

site_cluster_var_imp
ggsave(
  filename = "site_shap.png",
  plot = site_cluster_var_imp,
  path = here("Figs/Supplement/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 40,
  height = 20,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = "retina"
)

```

### PDP

```{r}
#     across(
#       all_of(best_lag$variable),
#       ~ {
#         this_lag <- best_lag$lag[best_lag$variable == cur_column()]
#         slider::slide_dbl(
#           .x,
#           mean,
#           .before = this_lag,
#           .after = 0,
#           .complete = TRUE
#         )
#       },
#       .names = "{.col}_lag"
#     )
#   ) |>
#   ungroup()
# unscalled_lag <- rename_lagged(unscalled_lag, best_lag)
# 
# var_ranges <- unscalled_lag |>
#   group_by(Site) |>
#   summarise(across(all_of(selected_vars),
#                    \(x) list(c(min(x, na.rm = TRUE), max(x, na.rm = TRUE)))))
# 
# 
# for (var in selected_vars) {
#   for (cl in classes) {
#     for (s in sites) {
#       # site training data
#       train_s <- train_data |> 
#         filter(Site == s) |> 
#         select(all_of(selected_vars)) |> 
#         drop_na()
#       # if a site has zero or 1 rows, skip it
#       if (nrow(train_s) < 2) next
# 
#       pd <- pdp::partial(
#         object = fitted_model,
#         pred.var = var,
#         train = train_s,
#         prob = TRUE,
#         which.class = cl
#       ) |>
#         mutate(
#           variable = var,
#           cluster = cl,
#           Site = s
#         ) |>
#         rename(predictor_value = !!sym(var))
# 
#       pdp_out[[paste(var, cl, s, sep = "_")]] <- pd
#     }
#   }
# }
# pdp_df <- bind_rows(pdp_out)
# 
# p <- list()
# 
# for (var in selected_vars) {
# 
#   df_var <- pdp_df |> 
#     filter(variable == var) |> 
#     group_by(Site, cluster, variable) |> 
#     mutate(prob_scale = rescale(yhat, to = c(0, 1))) |> 
#     ungroup()
#   
#   
#     df_var <- df_var |>
#       left_join(var_ranges, by = "Site") |>
#       rowwise() |>
#       mutate(
#         predictor_orig =
#           (predictor_value / 100) *
#           (get(variable)[[2]] - get(variable)[[1]]) +
#           get(variable)[[1]]
#       ) |>
#       ungroup() |> 
#       mutate(
#       variable = case_when(
#         variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],
#         TRUE ~ variable
#       )
#     ) 
# 
#   p[[var]] <- df_var |> 
#     ggplot(aes(x = predictor_orig, y = prob_scale, color = cluster)) +
#     geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
#     scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
#     facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_x") +
#     labs(
#       x = var_names[var],
#       y = "Scaled probability (0–1 within Regime)",
#       color = "Regime",
#       title = "PDP by Regime × Site",
#       subtitle = paste("Predictor:", var_names[var])
#     ) +
#     theme_few()
# }
# 
# p
# 
# 
# ggsave(
#   filename = "site_pdp_asdn.png",
#   plot = p$active_network_length_m_0d,
#   path = here("Figs/Supplement/"),
#   device = "png",
#   width = 40,
#   height = 20,
#   units = "cm",
#   dpi = "retina"
# )
```

```{r}
# 
# classes <- levels(train_data$Cluster)
# 
# pdp_out <- list()
# 
# regions <- train_data |> 
#   select(all_of(selected_vars), Site) |> 
#   left_join(site_info |> select(Site, Region)) |> 
#   pull(Region) |> 
#   unique()
# 
# train_data <- train_data |> 
#   left_join(site_info |> select(Site, Region))
# 
# for (var in selected_vars) {
#   for (cl in classes) {
#     for (region in regions) {
#       # region training data
#       train_region <- train_data |> 
#         filter(Region == region) |> 
#         select(all_of(selected_vars))
#       
#       # must have enough rows
#       if (nrow(train_region) < 2) next
# 
#       # drop rows where this var is NA (prevents min/max Inf/-Inf)
#       train_region_nonmiss <- train_region |>
#         filter(!is.na(.data[[var]]))
# 
#       if (nrow(train_region_nonmiss) < 2) next
# 
#       # need some variation; constant predictor can also cause trouble/useless PD
#       if (length(unique(train_region_nonmiss[[var]])) < 2) next
#       
#       pd <- pdp::partial(
#         object = fitted_model,
#         pred.var = var,
#         train = train_region,
#         prob = TRUE,
#         which.class = cl
#       ) |>
#         mutate(
#           variable = var,
#           cluster = cl,
#           Region = region
#         ) |>
#         rename(predictor_value = !!sym(var))
# 
#       pdp_out[[paste(var, cl, region, sep = "_")]] <- pd
#     }
#   }
# }
# pdp_df <- bind_rows(pdp_out)
# 
# p <- list()
# 
# for (var in selected_vars) {
#   
#   df_var <- pdp_df |> 
#     filter(variable == var) |> 
#     group_by(Region, cluster, variable) |> 
#     mutate(prob_scale = rescale(yhat, to = c(0, 1))) |> 
#     ungroup() |> 
#     mutate(
#       variable = case_when(
#         variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],
#         TRUE ~ variable
#       )
#     ) 
#   
#   p[[var]] <- df_var |> 
#     ggplot(aes(x = predictor_value, y = prob_scale, color = cluster)) +
#     geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
#     scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
#     facet_wrap(~ Region, scales = "free_x") +
#     labs(
#       x = var_names[var],
#       y = "Scaled probability (0–1 within Regime)",
#       color = "Regime",
#       title = "PDP by Regime × Region",
#       subtitle = paste("Predictor:", var_names[var])
#     ) +
#     theme_few()
# }
# 
# p
# 
# 
# ggsave(
#   filename = "site_pdp_asdn.png",
#   plot = p$active_network_length_m_0d,
#   path = here("Figs/Supplement/"),
#   device = "png",
#   width = 40,
#   height = 20,
#   units = "cm",
#   dpi = "retina"
# )

```

```{r}
classes <- levels(train_data$Cluster)

pdp_out <- list()

sites <- train_data |>
  select(all_of(selected_vars), Site) |>
  left_join(site_info |> select(Site, Region)) |>
  pull(Site) |>
  unique()

for (var in selected_vars) {
  for (cl in classes) {
    for (s in sites) {
      # region training data
      train_site <- train_data |>
        filter(Site == s) |>
        select(all_of(selected_vars))

      # must have enough rows
      if (nrow(train_site) < 2) next

      # drop rows where this var is NA (prevents min/max Inf/-Inf)
      train_site_nonmiss <- train_site |>
        filter(!is.na(.data[[var]]))

      if (nrow(train_site_nonmiss) < 2) next

      # need some variation; constant predictor can also cause trouble/useless PD
      if (length(unique(train_site_nonmiss[[var]])) < 2) next

      pd <- pdp::partial(
        object = fitted_model,
        pred.var = var,
        train = train_site,
        prob = TRUE,
        which.class = cl
      ) |>
        mutate(
          variable = var,
          cluster = cl,
          Site = s
        ) |>
        rename(predictor_value = !!sym(var))

      pdp_out[[paste(var, cl, s, sep = "_")]] <- pd
    }
  }
}
pdp_df <- bind_rows(pdp_out)

p <- list()

for (var in selected_vars) {

  df_var <- pdp_df |>
    filter(variable == var) |>
    group_by(Site, cluster, variable) |>
    mutate(prob_scale = rescale(yhat, to = c(0, 1))) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(
      variable = case_when(
        variable %in% names(var_names) ~ var_names[variable],
        TRUE ~ variable
      )
    )

  p[[var]] <- df_var |>
    ggplot(aes(x = predictor_value, y = prob_scale, color = cluster)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
    facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_x") +
    labs(
      x = var_names[var],
      y = "Scaled probability (0–1 within Regime)",
      color = "Regime",
      title = "PDP by Regime × Site",
      subtitle = paste("Predictor:", var_names[var])
    ) +
    theme_few()
}

p

```

```{r}
beepr::beep(2)
# unlink(here("Results/rf/lagged_rf_exact_shap.rds"))
# unlink(here("Results/rf/ale_env.rds"))
```
